description:
IT'S OFFICIAL- THE HABROMANIA STEAM PAGE IS UP! Chapter one (the demo) is set to be released this September, 2025. 

Link below and also in my bio!
https://store.steampowered.com/app/3677050/HABROMANIA/?beta=0


This is actually the most surreal thing that has ever happened to me in the 21 years I've been alive. To see this game go from a little doodle I made in class to a full-fledged game with it's own OST and fanbase, made by a team of 13+ incredibly talented animators, artists, composers, and programmers, still doesn't feel real to me. I feel so incredibly overwhelmed by the support you guys have given this project and I am so proud and excited to finally have the steam page up, with chapter one coming this September. If you'd like to support the game, please wishlist it using the link in my bio! Every wishlist helps us with Steam. But I am so, so, so, so grateful for you guys coming on this game dev journey with me. I am really proud of what we have, and I hope you guys enjoy the game as much as I've enjoyed working on it. IT'S FINALLY HERE!!!!
